executive_summary: Build failure analysis for attempt 3 reveals a critical configuration error. The GitHub Actions workflow file (.github/workflows/build.yml) was not found in the repository, preventing the build from executing. This is a CONFIGURATION_ERROR that must be resolved before any Maven build can proceed. The workflow dispatch endpoint returned HTTP 404, indicating the workflow file does not exist or is not accessible at the specified path.

errors.title: GitHub Actions Workflow File Not Found
errors.description: The GitHub Actions workflow file at path .github/workflows/build.yml does not exist in the repository. This prevents any build from being triggered via workflow dispatch.
errors.error_message: HTTP Error 404: Not Found. Workflow dispatch endpoint returned 404. Possible causes: token missing workflow/actions permissions, workflow not accessible on this repo/branch, or Actions disabled. dispatch_url=https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches response_body={"message":"Not Found","documentation_url":"https://docs.github.com/rest/actions/workflows#create-a-workflow-dispatch-event","status":"404"}
errors.root_cause: The workflow file .github/workflows/build.yml is missing from the repository at branch 'main'. This could be due to: (1) The file was never created, (2) The file was deleted, (3) The file exists but at a different path, or (4) GitHub Actions is disabled for this repository.
errors.impact: Complete build pipeline failure. No builds can be executed until the workflow file is created and properly configured. This blocks all CI/CD automation including compilation, testing, and deployment.

errors.title: Workflow Dispatch API Endpoint Failure
errors.description: The GitHub Actions API endpoint for workflow dispatch returned a 404 error, indicating the workflow cannot be triggered programmatically.
errors.error_message: Workflow file not found - Final attempt failure. API endpoint: https://api.github.com/repos/loginkarun/scib_demo/actions/workflows/.github%2Fworkflows%2Fbuild.yml/dispatches returned status 404.
errors.location: GitHub Actions API - Workflow Dispatch Endpoint
errors.root_cause: The workflow dispatch API call failed because the target workflow file does not exist. The API correctly returns 404 when attempting to dispatch a non-existent workflow.
errors.impact: Automated build triggers are non-functional. Manual and automated CI/CD processes cannot initiate builds. This affects continuous integration, pull request validation, and scheduled builds.

recommended_fixes.description: Create the missing .github/workflows/build.yml file with proper Maven build configuration.
recommended_fixes.implementation:
1. Create directory structure: .github/workflows/
2. Create build.yml file with Maven build steps
3. Configure workflow_dispatch trigger
4. Add necessary build steps: checkout, setup-java, maven build
5. Commit and push to main branch
recommended_fixes.automation_script: Use GitHub Feature Branch Script Committer to create .github/workflows/build.yml with standard Maven build configuration including: workflow_dispatch trigger, ubuntu-latest runner, Java 11/17 setup, Maven build with 'mvn clean install' command.
recommended_fixes.validation: Verify workflow file appears in GitHub Actions tab. Test workflow dispatch via API or UI. Confirm workflow runs successfully.

recommended_fixes.description: Ensure GitHub Actions is enabled for the repository and the token has proper permissions.
recommended_fixes.implementation:
1. Navigate to repository Settings > Actions > General
2. Verify Actions are enabled
3. Check workflow permissions (read/write)
4. Verify GitHub token has 'workflow' scope
5. Test API access with token
recommended_fixes.automation_script: Validate token permissions by calling GitHub API: GET /repos/loginkarun/scib_demo to check if Actions are enabled. Verify token scopes include 'workflow' and 'repo'.
recommended_fixes.validation: Confirm Actions tab is visible in repository. Verify API calls return 200 status. Test workflow dispatch succeeds.

compliance_notes.audit_trail: Build failure attempt 3 analyzed on 2025-01-24. No Maven build logs available due to workflow file absence. Configuration error classified as CRITICAL blocking issue.
compliance_notes.security_impact: No security vulnerabilities detected. Issue is purely configuration-related.
compliance_notes.remediation_status: PENDING - Awaiting workflow file creation and GitHub Actions configuration.
